headline: Cisco’s AI Platforms And Cybersecurity Push Test Valuation For Investors
summary: Cisco Systems (NasdaqGS:CSCO) has rolled out Cloud Control, an AI-centric platform that ties together networking, observability, and security. The company has expanded its Live Protect automated cybersecurity offering and introduced a quantum-safe security framework. Cisco has deepened its alliance with NetApp, launching joint solutions for secure AI infrastructure and ransomware resilience. These product launches and partnerships were highlighted around the Cisco Live event and come after...

headline: Broadcom stock sinks. Are AI earnings expectations 'insatiable'?
summary: Broadcom (AVGO) stock sinks further in Thursday trading despite topping estimates for fiscal second quarter earnings and revenue, while also outpacing forecasts on third quarter guidance. Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management Company CIO Brent Schutte joins Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Ines Ferré and Brooke DiPalma in assessing Broadcom's post-earnings stock reaction compared to other AI players.

headline: WLAN Market Continues Double-Digit Growth in 1Q 2026 Despite Memory Shortage, According to Dell'Oro Group
summary: According to a recently published report from Dell'Oro Group, the trusted source for market information about the telecommunications, security, networks, and data center industries, 1Q 2026 WLAN revenues were driven by a 14 percent growth in unit shipments, and an average selling price that is starting to creep up.
